Petition To Approve (Compromise Of Pending Action)
Off Calendar Aug-06-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for a Hearing on a Compromise of Pending Action (Adult with a disability.
Department 514, Judge: Angela Bradstreet, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.
Petitioner: Frederick Mahan, Esq., Claimant's Husband and guardian ad litem present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examinded.
Teresa C. Senior, Esq., appearing for Defendant, Carnival, plc erronously sued herein as Carnivalplc, trading as Cunard Line as Operator, and Steiner Transocean Limted, erronously sued herein as Steiner Transocean, via CourtCall.
After testimony and consideration of the evidence presented, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved as follows: Terms and conditions of Settlement are confidential.
Court signed Order in open court. Order after hearing to be filed under seal pursuant to Order Sealing issued and filed by the Law and Motion Department on August 3, 2015.

Status Hearing Scheduled on October 13, 2015 at 9:00 AM, in Department 514 for filing of receipt for the deposit of money into blocked account. No appearance is required if the receipt is filed and courtesy copy lodge with Depart. 514 prior to Hearing.
Counsel Teresa C. Senior Oral request to the court to appear for next hearing via court call is denied. Court ordered counsel to personally appear on the next hearing date is there is not compliance with the court order signed and filed this day.
Court Ordered the Transcript of the Proceedings sealed.
